code:
type Tree =
  | Leaf
  | Node(left: Tree, right: Tree)

fn max(_ a: Int, _ b: Int) -> Int
  if a >= b
    a
  else
    b
  end
end

fn depth(_ t: Tree) -> Int
  match t
  when Leaf
    0
  when Node(left: l, right: r)
    1 + max(depth(l), depth(r))
  end
end

let tree = Tree.Node(
  left: Tree.Node(left: Tree.Leaf, right: Tree.Node(left: Tree.Leaf, right: Tree.Leaf)),
  right: Tree.Leaf,
)
print("depth=#{depth(tree)}")
